limitations: Advisory-only foundation; no OCR, no PDF raster parsing, and no screenshot analysis were used.
Vector geometry without reliable text labels is not promoted to semantic matches in this task.
Unsupported or missing extraction evidence remains unknown instead of being inferred as pass.

layout_readability.summary: 1 advisory layout/readability finding(s) confirmed from structured metadata.

findings.message: Structured QA evidence shows overlapping drawing text.
findings.recommendation: Separate overlapping note or dimension text and reroute leaders if needed.

recommended_actions: Separate overlapping note or dimension text and reroute leaders if needed.
Separate overlapping note or dimension text and reroute leaders if needed.
Add a required linear dimension intent for overall length from a declared datum or edge.
Add a required linear dimension intent for overall width from a declared datum or edge.
Add a required thickness/height dimension intent on a front or side view.
Add required X/Y or ordinate location intent for "hole_left" from declared datums.
Add required X/Y or ordinate location intent for "hole_right" from declared datums.
Enable or verify center marks/centerlines for hole views.
Add or verify the material note in the title block or general notes.
Add a local detail view only if diameter/location callouts collide or become unreadable.

recommended_views.reason: Top view is the clearest evidence-backed view for plate footprint and hole locations.

confidence.rationale: Conservative view rule matched reliable geometry evidence.

recommended_views.reason: Front view supports body thickness/height communication without relying on an isometric view.

confidence.rationale: Conservative view rule matched reliable geometry evidence.

confidence.rationale: Box body dimensions are explicit in config or feature evidence.

recommended_annotations.message: Show center marks or centerlines for hole features.
recommended_annotations.reason: Hole features are present; center marks improve inspection readability without adding tolerance claims.

confidence.rationale: Hole features are reliable drawing evidence.

recommended_annotations.suggested_fix: Enable or verify center marks/centerlines for hole views.

recommended_annotations.message: Carry material note "AL6061" on the drawing.
recommended_annotations.reason: Material is explicitly declared in drawing/manufacturing metadata.
recommended_annotations.suggested_fix: Add or verify the material note in the title block or general notes.

detail_view_recommendations.message: Consider a detail view for small hole callouts if the sheet scale makes them crowded.
detail_view_recommendations.reason: Small hole diameter evidence is present; this remains conditional on drawing readability.

confidence.rationale: Small feature evidence supports only a conditional detail-view recommendation.

detail_view_recommendations.suggested_fix: Add a local detail view only if diameter/location callouts collide or become unreadable.

confidence.rationale: Aggregate confidence from deterministic feature and drawing-intent evidence; recommendations remain advisory.

limitations: Planner recommendations are advisory and do not replace TechDraw generation.
No GD&T or tolerance callout is inferred unless explicitly present in drawing metadata.
Functional requirements are not inferred beyond drawing_intent and reliable feature evidence.
